name: Hermes — Daily Job Hunt v2

nodes.name: 6PM PH (10:00 UTC)
nodes.notes: 6:00 PM Philippines time = 10:00 UTC. Catches same-day PH job posts.

nodes.name: 1AM PH (17:00 UTC)
nodes.notes: 1:00 AM Philippines time = 17:00 UTC. Catches US workday job posts (US Eastern 1PM).

nodes.name: Trigger Hermes Pipeline
nodes.notes: Calls Python server — scrapes all 4 sources, deduplicates via SQLite, scores new jobs with Claude Haiku, sends top 10 to Telegram.

notes:
Hermes v2 — 4 job sources, SQLite deduplication, per-job Telegram messages.
Import: n8n → Workflows → Import from file → select this JSON.
